sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46206" key="zhlai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζηλ-αῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ζῆλος</etym>) <sense id="n46206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">jealous,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
